since_last: 20% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads -0.13%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 20% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.35% · BTC -1.82% · Gold -2.37% · Nasdaq100 -2.16%. 20% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at -0.13%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.13%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.63%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -14.26%
cards.body: Leaders: HON +6.66%, AVAV +5.03%, SKHY +3.00%, MU +2.87%, GEV +2.55%. Laggards: TSLA -14.26%, CRNC -7.17%, GOOGL -6.97%, UPST -5.62%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.97% at $112.99
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.97% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
